nasb.text: then come and stand before Me in this house, which is called by My name, and say, ‘We are delivered!’—that you may do all these abominations?

esv.text: and then come and stand before me in this house, which is called by my name, and say, ‘We are delivered!’—only to go on doing all these abominations?

cnv.text: 然後來到這稱為我名下的殿，站在我面前，說：‘我們安全啦！’你們這樣就可以行這一切可憎的事嗎？

ccb.text: 然后来到这用来敬拜我的殿，站在我面前说自己安全了，以为可以继续做可憎之事。
